review_summary.college_name: Arya Post Graduate College Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: Master of Commerce (M.Com.) - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: My honest review on Arya PG College Panipat.

content.Placements: The highest package in my course M. Com is 15-25 LPA and the lowest is 1-2 LPA. Top recruiting companies in my course are Airtel, HDFC, SBI, ICICI, Google, Microsoft, TCS, Vivo, etc. In my knowledge, almost 39-64 percent students got internship or jobs just after completing their course.
content.Infrastructure: Facilities in this college are top. I am very satisfied with this college. Facilities are neat and clean – drinking water, neat and clean classrooms, neat and clean washrooms, separate entry and exit gate for boys and girls, separate park for boys & girls, and food quality in canteen is fine.

individual_reviews.course: Master of Commerce (M.Com.) - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Arya PG College is really good college because of their good facility and good placements.

content.Placements: In my course M.Com, almost 30-35 percent of students are placed. The highest package is around 5-9 LPA, and the lowest package is 2-5 LPA, with an average package of around 1-4 LPA. Companies include Kotak, Canara Bank, Union Bank of India, etc. Around 50-65 percent of students got internships just after completing their course. Top roles offered are banker, tax consultant, CA accountant, etc.
content.Infrastructure: The college has well-maintained classrooms, 24/7 CCTV cameras, a large collection of books in the library, fresh drinking water, separate parks for boys and girls, and very good canteen with fresh food. Free Wi-Fi is available for all students, and working computers are available in the internet zone attached to the library.

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. in Non Medical - Batch of 2021
individual_reviews.title: Overall, the college was average.

content.Placements: Mostly 40-50% students get placement. 1 LPA to 1.75 LPA. Top recruiting companies are Infosys, Wipro, ICICI, Walmart, Adobe, HCL, Yamaha, TCS, IBM, DAKSH, Mahindra & Mahindra, APEX Labs. 20-30% of students got internships. They didn't tell me. And my batch students were good.
content.Infrastructure: Facilities and infrastructure were average. The whole class had A.C., and the air was good. And Wi-Fi is also good with clean classrooms. And yes, my college has a canteen, and the food quality was also good; me and my friends used to eat from the college canteen.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Computer Applications (BCA) - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Arya PG College is the top college in Panipat.

content.Placements: The highest package in my course is 50-75L per month, the lowest package is 25-75 thousand per month, and the average package is 25-40 thousand per month. The top recruiting companies in my course are Google, HDFC, Kotak, Airtel, Tata, Microsoft, Tesla, etc. Top roles in my course are Data admin, Web developer, etc.
content.Infrastructure: High-speed Wi-Fi in every classroom, fresh drinking water, neat and clean washrooms, working computers in the computer lab, and a library with a large collection of books available. Internet zone for students, a separate library sitting area for boys and girls, well-maintained infrastructure, and time-to-time renovation. Neat and clean food in the canteen.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Computer Applications (BCA) - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Arya PG College was my best learning experience.

content.Placements: Almost 15 percent of students got placed from my course. The highest package in my course is 15 LPA to 1 crore per annum and the lowest package is Rs. 25,000 to 2 LPA. The top recruiting companies in my course are Facebook, HP, Dell, Vivo, Google, Microsoft, etc. The top roles are software developer, data admin, front-end developer, backend developer, etc.
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure is well-maintained and facilities are top-notch. There is a CCTV camera in every area, a separate canteen, park, entry gates for boys and girls, a neat and clean study area, fresh and clean drinking water, a fresh and hygienic canteen, a variety of food, and an affordable price in the canteen.

reviews.review_heading: Arya PG College was my best learning experience.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is well-maintained and facilities are top-notch. There is a CCTV camera in every area, a separate canteen, park, entry gates for boys and girls, a neat and clean study area, fresh and clean drinking water, a fresh and hygienic canteen, a variety of food, and an affordable price in the canteen.

reviews.review_heading: Our college has very poor placements, but it has good faculty members.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is good. New buildings are being constructed on the campus. One new building has already been constructed. It has 2-3 separate grounds for both boys and girls. There is no common ground for both. There is a separation in the canteen too for both boys and girls.

reviews.review_heading: Fully satisfied because of good placements since 2000 and good facilities.
reviews.review_text: Facilities they provide include free high-speed Wi-Fi, working computers in the lab, fresh drinking water, CCTV cameras, and neat and clean classrooms. Along with smart boards in all classes, a silent library that is good for reading, and an internet zone where we can access the internet on computers and learn new things. The canteen has the best quality of food. But the canteen food price is very high, so I order food from outside the college, like Swiggy or Zomato.

reviews.review_heading: I am totally satisfied because of the good infrastructure and very good teachers.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is well-maintained. Benches are neat and clean, drinking water is fresh, washrooms are clean, and CCTV is installed. There is a separate gate and park for girls, and canteens for both boys and girls. Almost 80 students can sit in a classroom. The library is also good, well-maintained, and disciplined. The canteen food is very tasty, and I like it very much.

reviews.review_heading: I am absolutely satisfied because of their good faculty.
reviews.review_text: Almost all basic facilities are available in the college. It includes neat and clean washrooms, CCTV cameras in all classes, working computers in all labs, a large collection of books in the library, a silent and good environment in the library, and fresh drinking water. The quality of canteen food is fine. But I do not like the canteen food because the canteen is not properly neat and clean. The food quality is very bad. I recommend ordering food or going outside to eat.

reviews.review_heading: Satisfied with Arya PG College because of the good placement facilities and teacher behaviour.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is well maintained regularly with maintenance time to time and facilities. They provide neat and clean benches CCTV cameras high speed Wi-Fi in lab and in internet zone. Large collection of books in the library. It is very silent good for reading. In computer lab AC is provided and a beautiful separate park for both boys and girls. The quality of food in canteen is average. Almost all types of food are available at very affordable prices.

reviews.review_heading: My honest review of Arya PG College.
reviews.review_text: Facilities given are okay, like working Wi-Fi (sometimes it is not working) and HD CCTV cameras in every class for security. Benches are neat and clean. The library is very good, providing a silent environment for students, and we can read any book, which helps most. College facilities are good.

reviews.review_heading: I am totally satisfied with this college.
reviews.review_text: Facilities are top-notch, including a well-maintained building, clean washrooms, fresh drinking water, and high-speed Wi-Fi in the library and labs. In a library, a large collection of books is available for reading. The quality of the canteen is good. Neat & clean canteen and tasty food.

reviews.review_heading: Totally satisfied with a good college.
reviews.review_text: Facilities are very good. There is high-speed Wi-Fi. Internet zone is provided. We have good teachers and staff support. There is a large collection of books in library. There is a good environment for studying and reading with full discipline. Canteen is good but food price is very high and messy.

reviews.review_heading: I am dissatisfied with this college.
reviews.review_text: Most of the classes are without CCTV cameras. Canteen is quite nice. Food served is okay. According to price, the food is worth it. The main thing is the whole campus. Wi-Fi is not available except in some computer labs. Only teachers can access the internet.

reviews.review_heading: It has good infrastructure and facilities.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is available in the library, and classrooms are always clean. It also provides labs for students. Food is very good and tasty in the canteen. For players, they provide sports. It provides a hostel for students who live far from college. We can also participate in events and sports. It provides good and fresh quality food in the canteen. It has many courses and departments. It provides good security to students.

individual_reviews.title: I'm very much satisfied with joining this college.

content.Placements: Mostly, those who were capable of passing the interview and answering the questions will all be placed in good companies. The minimum starting package for our BCA is 3.5 LPA to 4.5 LPA. There are many good companies that come to our campus, like Infosys, TCL, Dell and many more. Recently, one of our seniors got placed at Dell for an 8 LPA package. Internships will not be provided for any of the students in the college. We need to search, or we can ask faculty, who will suggest.

There are two types of libraries, digital and a normal book library. The labs were also good and well-equipped.

Hostel life is chill; the rooms are good but a bit compact. The food is decent; some may like it, and some may not, depending on the person. The university is not strict, so you can enjoy.

reviews.review_heading: Best college for M.Sc. Biotech because of good facilities and campus selection opportunities.
reviews.review_text: The M.Sc. Biotechnology program is located in the School of Science block. The campus features a playground, well-maintained laboratories, an auditorium, and classrooms equipped with smartboards. The library is spacious and includes computers, magazines, and all materials related to the respective subjects. The hostel offers comfortable rooms, a clean mess, and security for students' safety.

reviews.review_heading: It is one of the best technology-based colleges in Bengaluru.
reviews.review_text: The Wi-Fi speed is good and there are no complaints about it. They provide ethernet ports everywhere in the college and hostel rooms. The labs are well maintained and the systems are up-to-date. Classrooms are also well-maintained and have projectors as well. The library is a good place to study at this college. Food is very good in the mess as well as in the canteen. Medical facilities are available 24*7. There are basketball and badminton courts, as well as a huge field.

reviews.review_heading: One of the best college in Bengaluru.
reviews.review_text: Yes, there are really good facilities available. Like- for each subject lab classes is available. On the whole campus wi-fi network is available. Classroom features- a projector system, fan, lights, high-quality benches, and a clean and silence environmental.

reviews.review_heading: Honest truth review of gitam University.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is available but inside the buildings only and that to encrypted. classrooms are good but not AC, some are facilitated with projectors, good ventilation is available.there is a central library having fully computer system and opac enabled, plenty of books are available for every stream.There are also journal& newspaper section along with research reference section. Quality of labs are good having some costly instruments but not all.Canteen food is okay with respect to money. Hostel rooms a...

reviews.review_heading: The college life infrastructure everything was good.
reviews.review_text: The labs are average; the Wi-Fi is good and can be accessed anywhere and anytime on campus. The classrooms and library are good, with a nice collection of books, and they provide a digital library. Hostel, food, and medical facilities are excellent, and sports and games have their clubs and events.

placements.overview:
Azim Premji University provides vibrant placement opportunities to its students in various fields. Over the years, more than 4,531 students have been placed as part of the campus recruitment drives. APU Bhopal has a very visible tilt towards the social service aspect in its placements. This is displayed in the fact that 90% of the placed students from the university work in the social sector, while 80% of the alumni work in the disadvantaged parts of the country.

paragraphs: Chandigarh University, UP Campus admissions to all the UG and PG programmes are done via CUCET. The Chandigarh University admission process begins with applying for the CUCET exam.

college_info.college_name: Chandigarh University, UP Campus Scholarship Details

paragraphs: Chandigarh University, UP Campus offers merit and need-based scholarships at undergraduate and postgraduate levels. CUCET (Chandigarh University Common Entrance Test) aims to uphold Chandigarh University’s mission of offering accessible and affordable education. The test is designed to reduce financial barriers for students, ensuring that financial limitations do not hinder talented individuals from pursuing world-class education. By offering up to 100% scholarships and financial support through the test, the university encourages academic brilliance, attracts motivated students, and fosters an inclusive environment conducive to learning and personal growth.

Chandigarh University has committed up to INR 210 crores in scholarships, INR 170 crores for the CU Punjab campus and INR 40 crores for the CU Uttar Pradesh Campus. This initiative provides a pathway to exceptional educational and career opportunities, rewarding high-performing students and granting access to diverse, competitive programs across disciplines. Additionally, there are several scholarships available for reserved category students, wards of defense personnel, and early bird admission scholarships along with teaching assistantships in the form of stipends offered at CU.
Details for all these scholarships are as follows:

1. Chandigarh University Common Entrance Test (CUCET) 2025-26: To streamline the examination process, the Chandigarh University Common Entrance Test (CUCET) has been divided into two distinct phases: CUCET Phase-1 and CUCET Phase-2. The details for scholarships offered based on CUCET are as follows:

Chandigarh University Common Entrance Test (CUCET) 2025-26 provides a convenient exam experience by allowing candidates to take the test from their own homes. Aspirants can check the key requirements and exam details in this space:
Key Requirements and Exam Details:
Conclusion

In conclusion, visit the official website of the university, the Chandigarh University Common Entrance Test (CUCET) not only provides a valuable opportunity to access world-class education but also ensures that financial barriers do not hinder talented students from achieving their academic dreams. With generous scholarships up to 100% based on exam performance, CUCET paves the way for students to unlock their full potential and step into a promising future.
2. Post Graduate Scholarship for Professional Courses for SC/ST
This financial assistance (offered via UGC) is offered to 1,000 SC/ST candidates who are pursuing postgraduate courses in professional* subjects via the National Scholarship Portal.
NOTE: MA, MSc, MCom, MSW, and Mass Communication & Journalism courses are not accepted as professional courses.

3. Merit Scholarship Schemes for the Academic Session 2025-26: Students at CU can also avail merit scholarships on the basis of their scores in the national level entrance exams or last qualifying exam. The details for all these scholarships are as follows:

5. NATA/ JEE (Main)-Based Scholarships for BArch students

The university has also introduced a scholarship scheme i.e. Architecture Scholarships on the basis of NATA/ JEE Main Score for the students admitted during the academic session 2025-26. The details for this scholarship are as follows:

6. Teaching Assistant Stipend: Chandigarh University also offers an assistantship option for MSc and ME students. They get INR 5,000 and INR 8,000 per month, respectively, for a maximum of 10 months per year.
7. CGPA-Based Scholarships: 10% scholarships of the total are also given to the students who have attained 9.0 or above CGPA provided that the student is not availing any other scholarship.

8. Scholarship Scheme for wards of defence personnel: 5% seats in all courses of Chandigarh University are reserved for the wards and spouses of defence martyrs and their immediate dependent members. Additionally, defence officers in service who want to take up any course at CU with a study leave are offered 20% waiver on the semester fee. Concession details are as follows:

11. Early Bird Scholarship for PG students (2025-26): Students seeking admission to Master of Engineering Programs can avail early-bird scholarships as per the following conditions:
12. Other fee concessions: Apart from the above-mentioned scholarships, old students of CU, single girl child, CU teachers’ ward, orphan students and alumni of CU are also awarded scholarships.
NOTE: All eligible students can avail one scholarship at one time. In case of branch change, scholarship will be discontinued.

For renewal of scholarships at Chandigarh University, it is mandatory that the students admitted under all the above schemes shall have to maintain a minimum of 7.5 CGPA in regular semester exam in first chance without any semester drop/ failing which the concession shall be discontinued.
